series_metadata.series_description: The purpose of this file is to provide the Military Personnel Officer with pertinent personnel information while individual is an active member of the National Guard.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain as long as individual is active in ARNG. Retired to records holding area after individuals are separated from the National Guard. Held for 3 years, then microfilmed. Hard copy destroyed after microfilm has been certified., Paper: Wastepaper
